model_input:
You are a UI clicking agent. Given a screenshot of a screen, determine the pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at(x, y, confidence) with the center pixel coordinates of the target element.

Call click_at().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants me to click on the input field for "Username:".
Looking at the image, there is a text box with the placeholder "type here..." under the label "Username:".
I should find the coordinates of this text box.

Coordinates of the "type here..." input box:
Top-left: around (251, 372)
Bottom-right: around (569, 426)
Center: ( (251+569)/2, (372+426)/2 ) = (410, 399)

Let's refine the coordinates.
The input box is from x=251 to x=569 and y=372 to y=426.
The center is x=410, y=399.
